startup_config.description: Global app configuration, popups, and api redirection urls.

categories.description: Main channel category list containing category names, logos, types, and 'table_name'.

channels.description: Decrypted direct streaming URLs, DRM decryption keys, names, and logos for a specific category table_name.

live_matches.description: List of active live matches (cricket, football, etc.) with stream URLs and DRM keys.

sports_logos.description: Key-value dictionary mapping tournament names to logo URLs.
